stemHtml: Select the option which is not a Procedural Error (TEM model):

options.a: Ground navigation: attempting to turn down wrong taxiway or runway, taxi too fast, failure to hold short or missed taxiway or runway.
options.c: Documentation: wrong weight and balance, fuel information, ATIS, or clearance information recorded, misinterpreted items on paperwork; incorrect logbook entries or incorrect application of MEL procedures.
options.d: Checklists: wrong challenge and response; items missed, checklist performed late or at the wrong time.
